creator: root@sentry.granch.ru
text:
When Ethernet card 3Com 3c900-COMBO was installed, during
        booting kernel on console appear these lines:

        xl0:<3Com 3c900-COMBO EtherLink XL> rev 0x00 int a irq 10 on pci0.10.0
        xl0: Ethernet address: 00:60:97:9f:d4:cb
        xl0: selecting half duplex
        ifmedia_set: no match for 0x24/0xffffffff
        panic: ifmedia_set
        Automatic reboot in 15 seconds...

        than system went to reboot.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 
        Install 3Com 3c900-COMBO Ethernet card.
        Add "device xl0" to your kernel config and recompile kernel.
        Reboot from this kernel.
